info.name: AgentCourt API
info.description:
Policy-driven dispute resolution API for agent commerce.

7 policy templates | 39 rules | <500ms rulings | $0.05/dispute on Base

Base URL: https://agentcourt-api-production.up.railway.app

request.description: Check API status and loaded policies
Get rules for the api-quality policy
File a dispute for API response schema mismatch. Expected: full_refund ruling.
File a dispute for non-delivery of freelance work.
File a dispute for SLA/uptime breach.
File a dispute over bug bounty severity/reproducibility.
Get x402 payment manifest for agent discovery
